A police chase originating from a kidnapping in Hoboken ended in a multi-vehicle crash in Brooklyn, while NYC prepares for St. Patrick's Day parades causing road closures, and Mayor Mamdani announces initiatives to address water charges and support street vendors amid budget constraints.

### Risks & Alerts

- NYC police chase sparked by kidnapping in Hoboken ends in multi-vehicle crash on Belt Parkway in Brooklyn. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- St. Patrick’s Day parade will cause significant road closures in NYC on March 22. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Fire on Staten Island prompts FDNY response; details of the incident are emerging. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- Bronx leaders rally against Medicaid cuts that could leave thousands uninsured.
